programmes.show_description: Cécile recommends stopping fishing off the coast and warning the population against using tap water, while the worms are investigated more closely. (S1, ep 4)
There is a tense stand-off as officers try to talk down a man brandishing a samurai sword, while the cells fill up during a busy Saturday night in Newcastle. (S5, ep 10)
Documentary series charting the exploits of the City of London police, charged with safeguarding the Square Mile at the heart of the crime-ridden capital. (S4, ep 3)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S9, ep 9)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S9, ep 10)
Customers uncover concealed drugs. Biosecurity New Zealand find some troublesome items in a spiritual healer's luggage. (S12, ep 3)
A woman is caught body packing highly illegal objects. Meanwhile, there's trouble in Biosecurity. (S12, ep 4)
The rescue chopper is called upon when there's a crash on the rainy roads of the Southern Alps. An unlucky driver's Nissan has been damaged by both a rock and an axe. (S4, ep 7)
There's trouble for speeding tourists who take a corner way too fast, and also for a man who tries to cheat the registration system when he's caught out by his ex-wife. (S4, ep 8)
A British national plans his very own Brexit. A package of happiness arrives at the mail centre, and Customs go on a boat-hunt in the Bay of Islands. (S11, ep 3)
An American woman attempts to smuggle a live cat across the border, and Customs find a soft toy stuffed with more than just stuffing... (S11, ep 4)
Immigration deal with a Singaporean national who claims to be meeting a mystery man. Plus, a flood in the biosecurity zone shuts down the airport. (S11, ep 5)
Documentary series following the men and woman who work to keep New Zealand's borders safe. (S11, ep 6)
While an American's trip to Alaska heads south, officers suspect a convicted drug dealer is taking his business north. A ship containing weapons is also searched. (S2, ep 14)
Officers stop a father and son packing loads of ammo, but can't find the gun. Meanwhile, the Vessel Search Unit find a suspect sailor on a US tug. (S2, ep 15)
A young man's lies could keep him from his fiancee, while the discovery of a gold bar and lots of cash spell trouble for another traveller. (S2, ep 16)
While a last-minute booking leads a farm worker down a rocky road, the arrival of some toy trucks rightfully arouses suspicion. (S2, ep 17)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary series following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists. (S2, ep 3)

A new season of Caught On Dashcam! From crazy weather to shocking road rage and the answer to why the chicken crossed the road, all caught on camera! (S5, ep 1)
From novice drivers to taxi nightmares and even a horse-riding shotgun, it's time to buckle up for a brand-new episode of Caught On Dashcam! (S5, ep 2)
A look at the clever new methods the police and public are using to catch criminals. (S7, ep 5)
A look at the clever new methods the police and public are using to catch criminals. (S7, ep 6)

A new season of the insightful documentary following the daily dramas of caring for cheeky primates at the Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre. (S17, ep 9)

New & Exclusive. Vancouver: Encounter coastal sea wolves, endangered marmots, Western Toad tadpoles and more as you explore one of the most extraordinary islands on the planet. (1 of 6)
New & Exclusive. K'gari: Touch down on the largest sand island in the world, as stingrays hunt soldier crabs in the tidal shallows, acid frogs evade vicious predators and more. (2 of 6)
Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions' camouflage. (4 of 5)
From extreme weather to parking disputes, prepare to say 'Did that REALLY just happen?' in another exciting episode of Caught on Dashcam! (S6, ep 9)
A man takes the law into his own hands when his daughter is brutally murdered. Action thriller with Bruce Willis, Mike Tyson and Thomas Jane. (2022)
Buckle up! It's time for a new series of Caught on Dashcam. The show that brings you the thrills and spills from the world of driving - all caught on camera! (S6, ep 1)
From distracted drivers to animals on the attack and an unmissable heroic rescue - join us for a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam. (S6, ep 2)
Yvonne McCann: The tragic story behind the killing of Yvonne McCann, murdered by her husband after a row at home in 2020.
A sniper attack on the motorway puts police on full alert, and a man tries to run from police on foot but nature interferes with his getaway. (S16, ep 7)
Cameras capture an unbelievable smash as a drunk pushes his speed to the limit and a man thinks it's a good idea to hitch a ride with police. (S16, ep 8)
Police call on multiple units and the Eagle helicopter as they hunt a stolen Subaru and a cyclist can't quite comprehend why he can't bike along the motorway. (S16, ep 9)
A Kiwi stag night ditches the Aussie brother-in-law to be and a car crash leads to some unusual behaviour on the side of the motorway. (S16, ep 10)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S9, ep 5)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S9, ep 6)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S9, ep 7)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S9, ep 8)
A Brazilian man hiding a large quantity of cocaine is busted at Auckland Airport. Plus, a woman with undeclared seeds loses her cool with Biosecurity. (S11, ep 7)
Immigration deal with a Chinese national using a fake passport, while custom discover a huge stash of meth hidden among household items. (S11, ep 8)
Staff at Auckland Airport meet a Greek man with no money but a rich history, while Customs find jeans with more than just dodgy labels to hide. (S11, ep 9)
Customs deal with a Lithuanian man who has very questionable holiday plans and a risky item lands at the International Mail Centre. (S11, ep 10)
Officers investigate the suspicious luggage of a man returning from China and Vietnam. Drug detector dog Vulcan makes an amazing find. (S15, ep 15)
Border Force zero in on two men trying to avoid luggage checks as a search of their bags reveals why. There's a million-dollar find in the Mail Centre. (S15, ep 16)
Border Force are concerned when a man travelling from South America doesn't know the combination to open his suitcase. Officers uncover a backpack filled with drugs. (S15, ep 17)
A deadly parcel turns up at the Mail Centre. A suspicious bottle of cologne is investigated, and a couple are caught with a prohibited item that shocks Biosecurity. (S15, ep 18)
Find more spectacular crashes and roadside disasters in a new episode of Caught on Dashcam! (S6, ep 7)
From pesky traffic tricksters, navigation nightmares and terrifying tornadoes - join us for another exciting episode of Caught on Dashcam! (S6, ep 8)
Three visitors from Malaysia raise alarms when it emerges that they've cancelled their accommodation just before their flight and their lies begin to unravel. (S15, ep 9)
When a Chinese bulk carrier docks in Newcastle it appears there's been a major security breach and what the Border Force officers find is shocking. (S15, ep 10)
Border Force investigate the claims of two people who claim to be on their honeymoon when their travel itinerary raises alarm bells. (S15, ep 11)
A man struggles to explain what his plans are for a three-month trip to Australia, and suspicion heightens when a drug dog takes an interest in his bag. (S15, ep 12)

programmes.show_name: FILM: For The Love Of Lily
programmes.show_description: When a no-nonsense consultant is tasked by her boss to make the office greener, she partners up with a rooftop florist to make their building come alive. (2024)(89 mins)
The Partners: Check out some of the most remarkable bonds between man and dog in a special look at incredible human and canine partnerships. (S1, ep 3)
Coasts: Patrick Aryee examines the amazing animals that live on the coast. From crashing waves to extreme tides, surviving here takes ingenuity and incredible adaptations. (S1, ep 3)
Sharks of the Pacific Ocean: Join Steve as he tracks down 'shark hotspots' in the Pacific Ocean and works out how to protect them. (S1, ep 3)
A look at the clever new methods the police and public are using to catch criminals. (S7, ep 8)

For one night only, Rob and Romesh join the London Philharmonic Orchestra for what promises to be a memorable performance at a packed-out Royal Festival Hall. (S5, ep 4)
Ashley's cousin is kidnapped for a ransom - and when the boys lose the money, they need a backup plan. Strong language/adult humour. (S3, ep 3)
Katherine Ryan makes a welcome return to the stage in this stand-up special. Having previously denounced partnership, Katherine has since married her first love... accidentally.
